_comment: Installer-only file. Restaurant info comes from the owner via Telegram onboarding → restaurant-profile.json. This file holds API plumbing only.

composio._comment: One Composio Organization per restaurant client. The org-scoped API key + userId are the only credentials this VM needs. IMPORTANT: userId must be the ENTITY under which OAuth connections were created in the Composio dashboard — NOT your operator account ID. If you connected via the dashboard's Test button, it will look like 'pg-test-<something>'.

instagram._comment: igUserId is the Instagram Business Account ID — a 17-digit number starting with 17841. Find it in Meta Business Suite → Settings → Instagram accounts, or via Graph API Explorer: me/accounts?fields=instagram_business_account. Required by Instagram's Graph API; not optional.

imageGen._comment: Image generation model. Verify availability at https://openrouter.ai/models. Defaults to the current best Gemini image model — swap as newer ones ship. openrouterApiKey is the direct fallback used by generate-slides.js and drive-inventory.js when Composio's OpenRouter proxy isn't set up.

imageHost._comment: Only needed if a posting script ever needs a public-URL image host. Get a free key at https://api.imgbb.com (30 sec). Currently unused for Instagram carousel posts (image_file path handles hosting via Composio) — kept for future flows that need a public URL.
